title: agrostis tenella
intro: Agrostis tenella, also known as red top or red-top bentgrass, is a species of grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis tenella include the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Agrostis tenella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
